headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://images.microcms-assets.io; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://player.vimeo.com; form-action 'self' https://formsubmit.co https://formspree.io; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
